name: SGP40 VOC Air Quality Sensor
description: Sensirion SGP40 digital VOC sensor for air quality, I2C 0x59, 1.7-3.6V (VDD and VDDH must share one supply), DFN-6 with sensing opening on top (do not cover). Die pad = GND, soldering recommended.
dimensions_source: Sensirion SGP40 datasheet v1.2: Fig.13 DFN-6 2.44x2.44x0.85 (pitch 0.8, terminal 0.4x0.35, die pad 1.25x1.64); Fig.14 recommended land (pads 0.4x0.55, centers 2.3 c-c - geometry-verified vs center pad clearance, center 1.25x1.7). Pinout Table 6 p.7.
